notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Spencer Horwitz. George Springer scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 3rd. Daulton Varsho to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Spencer Horwitz. George Springer scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 3rd. Daulton Varsho to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds grounds out, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Brandon Lowe scores. Nick Gonzales to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Ernie Clement reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
